summary: Frontend-only testing of Tokyo Circuit racing game. All critical flows tested and working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All game flows working: landing page, car selection (3 cars), countdown (3,2,1), HUD (speed/lap/time/position), WASD controls. All data-testid attributes present and functional.
tests_passed: Landing page renders with TOKYO CIRCUIT title
car-select-red, car-select-blue, car-select-yellow all exist and selectable
Sakura Red shows SELECTED state when clicked
HUD shows hud-speed (0 then 233 after W press), hud-lap (1/3), hud-time (ticking), hud-pos (P3)
Cars visible on track with Japanese theme (cherry blossoms, mountains)
